common.empty: No records found for this view.

overview.title: Governance Workspace
overview.description: Operational governance for privileged activity, webhook forensics, staff onboarding, and the currently visible policy surface.
overview.routesDescription: Move directly into the audit, webhook, staff-access, and policy surfaces without leaving the admin shell.

routes.auditLog: Inspect recent privileged actions and entity changes.
routes.webhookLog: Review callback validity, processing state, and provider errors.
routes.adminInvites: Create, review, copy, and revoke staff invite tokens.
routes.policy: Review visible settings and the current role-permission matrix.

overview.auditDescription: Latest privileged actions captured by the backend audit stream.
overview.webhookDescription: Latest callback state across provider integrations.
overview.invitesDescription: Active invite tokens currently exposed for staff onboarding.
overview.policyDescription: Current visibility into settings and governance coverage.

auditLog.title: Audit Explorer
auditLog.description: Read the recent privileged action stream and inspect before/after payloads for governance review.
auditLog.streamDescription: Current audit page {page}. Search is applied client-side to the fetched slice.
auditLog.detailDescription: Selected audit entry with attribution, request metadata, and payload diff.
auditLog.empty: No audit entries match the current view.

webhookLog.title: Webhook Explorer
webhookLog.description: Inspect callback validity, processing state, payloads, and provider-side failures.
webhookLog.streamDescription: Current webhook page {page}. Filtering is applied locally to the fetched slice.
webhookLog.detailDescription: Selected callback with status, provider metadata, and raw payload preview.
webhookLog.empty: No webhook entries match the current view.

adminInvites.title: Admin Invite Tokens
adminInvites.description: Create and manage invite tokens for onboarding new admin staff members.
adminInvites.inventoryDescription: Single-use staff invite tokens currently alive in Redis-backed storage.
adminInvites.createDescription: Generate a new invite token for a staff member and optionally restrict it to a specific email.
adminInvites.detailDescription: Selected invite token with issuer and TTL context.
adminInvites.copyFailed: Could not copy the invite token.
adminInvites.empty: No active admin invite tokens found.

policy.title: Policy Surface
policy.description: Current governance visibility across Remnawave settings and the backend role-permission matrix.
policy.registryDescription: Editable settings exposed by the current backend `/settings` layer.

editorDescription.create: Create a new visible setting entry through the current settings API.
editorDescription.update: Update the selected setting while preserving its existing key.

policy.detailDescription: Current JSON payload for the selected setting entry.
policy.roleMatrixDescription: Frontend mirror of the current backend permission mapping by staff role.
policy.gapDescription: The first dedicated `system_config` governance API is now live for `miniapp.runtime`. Broader system configuration families and a true admin directory still need to move off the generic `/settings` surface.
policy.selectionRequired: Select a setting before updating it.
policy.empty: No settings match the current view.

runtimeControl.title: Mini App Runtime Control
runtimeControl.description: Operator-managed rollout policy for Telegram Mini App trial, checkout, config delivery, and maintenance messaging.
runtimeControl.maintenancePlaceholder: Optional message shown during maintenance or rollback
runtimeControl.canaryAllowlistHint: Comma or newline separated Telegram user IDs. Only these users may access Mini App when mode is set to canary.
runtimeControl.canaryAllowlistInvalid: Enter valid Telegram user IDs in the canary allowlist.
runtimeControl.canaryAllowlistRequired: Canary mode requires at least one Telegram user ID.
runtimeControl.liveGateHint: Mini App cannot be switched to live mode until all launch readiness gates are marked complete.
runtimeControl.changeReasonPlaceholder: Why are you changing rollout policy?

launchReadiness.title: Mini App Launch Readiness
launchReadiness.description: Operator-owned launch gates that must be completed before Mini App runtime may switch into live mode.
launchReadiness.rollbackCommanderPlaceholder: Name or handle responsible for rollback decisions
launchReadiness.releaseWindowNotePlaceholder: Example: April 24, 18:00 UTC, staffed by support + backend on-call
launchReadiness.changeReasonPlaceholder: Why are you updating launch readiness?

launchSummary.title: Mini App Launch Summary
launchSummary.description: Server-derived launch state for Mini App runtime, readiness gates, and incident-response ownership.
launchSummary.noBlockers: No blockers. Mini App is clear to advance based on current state.

launchActions.title: Mini App Launch Actions
launchActions.description: Server-authoritative transitions for launch, maintenance, and rollback decisions.
launchActions.reasonPlaceholder: Why are you executing this launch action?
launchActions.noActions: No launch actions are currently available for this state.

success.promote_to_live: Mini App promoted to live mode.
success.enter_maintenance: Mini App placed into maintenance mode.
success.return_to_canary: Mini App returned to canary mode.

launchChecklist.title: Mini App Launch Checklist
launchChecklist.description: Operator-facing checklist derived from current launch summary and readiness ownership before live cutover.

launchTimeline.title: Mini App Launch Timeline
launchTimeline.description: Recent runtime, readiness, and launch-action decisions for production cutover review.
launchTimeline.empty: No Mini App launch events recorded yet.
